name: synthesis-workflow

metadata.name: synthesis-workflow
metadata.summary: Workflow used for synthesis and its validation.

documentation:
# Synthesis Workflow

This project contains several workflows used for neuron synthesis and the validation of this process.
It is divided into two packages:

- **synthesis-workflow**, which contains the workflow tasks and tools.
- **MorphVal**, which is a library used for morphology validation and can be used as a standalone.

## Installation

To install:

```
pip install synthesis-workflow
```

## Usage

### Synthesis workflow

The usual command is the following:

```
synthesis-workflow <workflow>
```

You can get help and complete parameter description with the following commands:

```
synthesis-workflow --help
synthesis-workflow <workflow> --help
```

You can also run a complete `luigi` command in order to fine-control task parameters:

```
luigi --module synthesis_workflow.tasks.workflows --help
luigi --module synthesis_workflow.tasks.workflows <workflow> --help
luigi --module synthesis_workflow.tasks.workflows <workflow> [specific arguments]
```

:::{note}
The `synthesis-workflow` command (or the complete `luigi` command) must be
executed from a directory containing a `luigi.cfg` file.
A simple example of such file is given in the `examples` directory.
:::

### Morphology validation

The usual command is the following:

```
morph-validation -t <path to reference data> -r <path to test data> -o <output path> -c <YAML config file> --bio-compare
```

You can get help and complete parameter description with the following command:

```
morph-validation --help
```

### Funding & Acknowledgment

The development of this software was supported by funding to the Blue Brain Project,
a research center of the École polytechnique fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL),
from the Swiss government's ETH Board of the Swiss Federal Institutes of Technology.

Copyright (c) 2022-2024 Blue Brain Project/EPFL

functions.name: morphval.validation.extract_hist
documentation:
Extract a histogram distribution from data.

Args:
    data: the data from which the histogram is computed
    bins: select the bins, according to numpy.histogram guidelines.

functions.name: morphval.validation.load_stat_test
documentation: Load stat test object from test name.

functions.name: morphval.validation.stat_test
documentation:
Run the selected statistical test.

Returns:
    the results(distance, pvalue) along with a PASS - FAIL statement
    according to the selected threshold.

functions.name: morphval.validation.write_hist
documentation: Write the histogram in the format expected by the validation report.

functions.name: morphval.validation.unpack_config_data
documentation: Return values needed for statistical tests from config file.

functions.name: morphval.validation.write_all
documentation: Write the histogram in the format expected by the validation report.

functions.name: morphval.validation.extract_feature
documentation:
Extract the distributions of the selected feature.

The distributions are extracted from the test and reference populations.

modules.name: morphval.common
documentation: Private helper functions of the validation module.

functions.name: morphval.common.add_progress_bar
documentation: Add a progress bar in notebooks.

functions.name: morphval.common.dump2json
documentation:
Save the dictionary 'data' into a .json file.

Args:

    var_name : the name of the dictionary as a string

functions.name: morphval.common.load_json
documentation:
Load a json file from file with fname into the results dictionary.

Returns:
    The results dictionary

functions.name: morphval.common.find_cells
documentation:
Return the cells in dir_name.

Args:
    dir_name (str): path to the directory containing the cells

Returns:
    The list of cell files

functions.name: morphval.common.pyplot_non_interactive
documentation:
Suppress pyplot showing blank graphs when in interactive mode.

This usually happens in the context of jupyter notebooks

functions.name: morphval.common.get_agg_fig
documentation: Yield a figure and close it afterwards.

functions.name: morphval.common.center_population
documentation: Return a new population where all cells have been translated to their soma origins.

functions.name: morphval.common.truncate_population
documentation: Return a new population with `count` elements.

functions.name: morphval.common.get_components_population
documentation: Get component of a given population.

functions.name: morphval.common.compute_bounding_box
documentation: Get bounding box of a population.

functions.name: morphval.common.plot_normalized_neurons
documentation:
Plot cell examples and store the file in output_dir.

Args:
    output_dir(str): path to the output directory
    ref_population(NeuroM morph population): reference population
    test_population(NeuroM morph population): test population
    cell_figure_count(int): number of exemplars to plot
    components(list of str): components to visualize
    notebook_desc(str): string used for labelling notebook progress bar

functions.name: morphval.config.load_config
documentation: Load configuration from a YAML file.

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.tools
documentation: Some tool functions used in synthesis.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.add_morphology_paths
documentation:
Same as the path loader of morph_tool.utils.neurondb_dataframe, but add multiple columns.

Args:
    morphs_df (pandas.DataFrame): the morphs_df DataFrame
    morphology_dirs: (dict) If passed, a column with the path to each morphology file
        will be added for each entry of the dict, where the column name is the dict key

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.add_apical_points
documentation:
Adds apical points isec in morphs_df.

Args:
    morphs_df (pandas.DataFrame): the morphs_df DataFrame
    apical_points (dict): name of cell as key and apical point isec as value

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.load_neurondb_to_dataframe
documentation:
Loads morphology release to a dataframe.

Args:
    neurondb_path (str): path to a neurondb.xml file
    morphology_dirs (dict): If passed, a column with the path to each morphology file
        will be added for each entry of the dict, where the column name is the dict key
    apical_points_path (str): path to JSON file containing apical points

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.find_case_insensitive_file
documentation: Helper function to find a file ignoring case.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.update_morphs_df
documentation: Updates a morphs_df with new entries to preserve duplicates.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools._wrap_worker
documentation: Wraps the worker job and catch exceptions that must be caught.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.run_master
documentation:
Running the parallel computation, (adapted from placement_algorithm).

Args:
    master_cls (class): The Master application
    kwargs (dict): A class with same attributes as CLI args
    parser_args (list): The arguments of the parser
    defaults (dict): The default values
    nb_jobs (int): Number of threads used
    verbose (int): verbosity level used by Joblib
    logger_kwargs (dict): Parameters given to logger in each processes

methods.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.IdProcessingFormatter.set_id
documentation: Updates current ID to insert in format.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tools.DebugingFileHandler
documentation: Logging class that can be retrieved.

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.count_passing_validations
documentation:
Count the number of passing, and total validations for a dict of features.

Returns:
    returns tuple(feature_pass, features_total)

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.compute_validation_criterion
documentation: Based on the config thresholds and criterion, computes if validation passed or failed.

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.do_validation
documentation:
Validate a test population against a reference population.

Args:
    validation_config(dict): {component: {feature: {...}}}
    ref_population(NeuroM morph population): reference population
    test_population(NeuroM morph population): test population

Returns:
    tuple of morphometrics, results, where morphometrics is a dictionary containing
    the raw feature values for the morphologies, and the results is a dictionary
    containing statistical results on this raw data

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.write_morphometrics
documentation: Dump CSV of morphometrics for each of the features.

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.compute_summary_statistics
documentation:
Compute the summary statistics of a feature.

Args:
    data : the feature data array

Returns:
    The dictionary summary_statistics which contains sample size,
    mean, standard deviation and median.

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.compute_statistical_tests
documentation:
Compute the test statistic and the p-value of a statistical test.

Args:
    test_data: the test feature array
    ref_data: the reference feature array
    test: the statistical test (ex.: KS test)
    thresh: the threshold

Returns:
    the dictionary : statistical tests

functions.name: morphval.validation_main.plot_save_feature
documentation:
Plot and saves the figure of the overlaid histograms of feature distributions.

The result image is a .png figure.

Args:
    figures_dir (str): the directory where the figures are stored,
    test_data (np.array): test feature array
    ref_data (np.array): reference feature array
    feature (str): the feature name
    bin_count (int): the number of histogram bins

classes.name: morphval.validation_main.Validation

methods.name: morphval.validation_main.Validation.__init__
documentation:
Create a new Validation object.

Args:
    config (dict): which validations to perform, and how:
        ex {'L23_PC':       # cell type
             {'soma':        # component
               {'soma_radii': # feature
                 {'stat_test': 'StatTests.ks',  # test configuration
                  'threshold': 0.1,
                  'bins': 40,
                  'criterion': 'dist'
                  }}}}
    test_data (str path or pandas.DataFrame): directory to the files under test or a
        pandas.DataFrame with 'mtype' and 'filepath' columns
    ref_data (str path or pandas.DataFrame): directory to the reference files or a
        pandas.DataFrame with 'mtype' and 'filepath' columns
    output_dir (str path): where the output should be written
    create_timestamp_dir (bool): whether a directory should be created in output_dir,
        with the timestamp of the run
    notebook (bool): trigger the Jupyter notebook mode

methods.name: morphval.validation_main.Validation.generate_report_data
documentation:
Generate dictionary with the text that will fill the template.

It contains all data of the results dictionary in text form with
additional information on the directories where the data come from.
tt is a shortcut for template text.

methods.name: morphval.validation_main.Validation.write_report
documentation:
For each mtype in the results, write out its report.

Args:
    validation_report(bool): True if 'validation' to be shown in report,
        False if p-values shown instead, with no 'Pass/Fail' information
    template_file(str): template file name
    prefix(str): report is saved as <prefix> + <mtype> + '.html'

Validation state object.

This class holds the state information of a validation run.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.utils._create_entry
documentation: Create a dict entry if it does not exist.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.utils.apply_parameter_diff
documentation: Apply a parameter diff from 'create_parameter_diff' to a parameter dict.

methods.name: synthesis_workflow.utils.DisableLogger.__enter__
documentation: Disabling the logger when entering the context manager.

methods.name: synthesis_workflow.utils.DisableLogger.__exit__
documentation: Enabling the logger when exiting the context manager.

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils
documentation: Some functions used to fit path distances with depth.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils._get_tmd_feature
documentation: Returns a list of features using tmd.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils.get_path_distances
documentation:
Returns path distances using tmd.

Args:
    input_population: the population of neurons

Returns:
    list of path distances

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils.get_projections
documentation:
Returns projections using tmd.

Args:
    input_population: the population of neurons

Returns:
    list of projections

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils.fit_function
documentation: The function used to fit data.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils.clean_outliers
documentation:
Returns data without outliers.

Args:
    x: the X-axis coordinates
    y: the Y-axis coordinates
    outlier_percentage: the percentage used to find and remove outliers

Returns:
    cleaned X and Y coordinates

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils.fit_path_distance_to_extent
documentation:
Returns slope and intercept of a linear fit.

Returns the two parameters (slope, intercept) for the linear fit of
path length (Y-variable) to total extents (X-variable).
Removes outliers up to outlier_percentage for a better fit.

Args:
    input_population: the population of neurons
    outlier_percentage: the percentage used to find and remove outliers
    neurite_type: neurite_type to make the fit

Returns: slope and intercept of the fit

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.fit_utils.get_path_distance_from_extent
documentation:
Returns a path distance for an input extent according to fitted function.

The function is given by the equation:
Path = slope * extent + intercept

Args:
    slope: the slope of the function
    intercept: the intercept of the function
    extent: the point where the function is evaluated

Returns: function value evaluated at x = extent

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis
documentation: Functions for synthesis to be used by luigi tasks.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.get_neurite_types
documentation: Get the neurite types to consider for PC or IN cells by checking if apical exists.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.apply_substitutions
documentation:
Applies substitution rule on .dat file.

Args:
    original_morphs_df (DataFrame): dataframe with morphologies
    substitution_rules (dict): rules to assign duplicated mtypes to morphologies

Returns:
    DataFrame: dataframe with original and new morphologies

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis._build_distributions_single_mtype
documentation: Internal function for multiprocessing of tmd_distribution building.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.build_distributions
documentation:
Build tmd_distribution dictionary for synthesis.

Args:
    mtypes (list): list of mtypes to build distribution for
    morphs_df (DataFrame): morphology dataframe with reconstruction to use
    diameter_model_function (function): diametrizer function (from diameter-synthesis)
    morphology_path (str): name of the column in morphs_df to use for paths to morphologies
    region (str): region we are building
    nb_jobs (int): number of jobs to run in parallal with joblib
    joblib_verbose (int): verbose level of joblib

Returns:
    dict: dict to save to tmd_distribution.json

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.get_axon_base_dir
documentation: Get the common base directory of morphologies.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.run_choose_morphologies
documentation:
Runs placement algorithm from python.

Args:
    kwargs (dict): dictionary with argument from placement-algorithm CLI
    nb_jobs (int): number of jobs
    debug_scales_path (str): path to the directory containing the log files

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.create_axon_morphologies_tsv
documentation:
Create required axon_morphology tsv file for placement-algorithm to graft axons.

Args:

: circuit_path (str): Path to circuit somata file
  morphs_df_path (str): Path to morphology dataframe
  atlas_path (str): Path to the atlas
  annotations_path (str): Path to annotations
  rules_path (str): Path to rules
  morphdb_path (str): Path to morphdb file
  alpha (float): Use `score ** alpha` as morphology choice probability
  scales (list(float)): Scale(s) to check
  seed (int): Random number generator seed
  axon_morphs_path (str): Name of the axon morphology list in .tsv format
  scores_output_path (str): Make `placement_algorithm.app.choose_morphologies` export scores

  > into files in this folder

  bias_kind (str): Kind of bias used to penalize scores of rescaled morphologies

  : (can be "linear" or "gaussian")

  with_optional_scores (bool): Use or ignore optional rules for morphology choice
  nb_jobs (int): Number of jobs

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.get_target_length
documentation: Compute the target length of a neurite from soma and target layer.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.get_max_len
documentation: Get the max length of a neurite, either in y direction, or in radial direction.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.rescale_neurites
documentation: Rescale neurites of morphologies to match target length.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.synthesis.rescale_morphologies
documentation: Rescale all morphologies to fulfill scaling rules.

methods.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.synthesis.BuildAxonMorphologies.get_neuron_db_path
documentation: Helper function to fix neuronDB vs neurondb in file names.

Run choose-morphologies to synthesize axon morphologies.

If no annotation file is given, axons will be randomly chosen from input cells.

Run placement-algorithm to synthesize morphologies.

Attributes:

        axon_morphs_base_dir if it is not provided

Add scaling rules to tmd_parameter.json.

    nb_jobs (int): Number of threads used for synthesis.

Add fits to trunk angles to tmd_parameter.json.

Attributes:

Rescale morphologies.

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation
documentation: Luigi tasks for validation of synthesis.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.ConvertCircuit
documentation:
Convert synthesize circuit file to morphs_df.csv file.

Attributes:
    ext (str): Extension for morphology files.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotMorphometrics
documentation:
Plot cell morphometrics for two groups of cells so they can be easily compared.

The generated images are like the following:

```{image} morphometrics-1.png
```

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotDensityProfiles
documentation:
Plot density profiles of neurites in an atlas.

Attributes:
    nb_jobs (int) : Number of joblib workers.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotCollage
documentation:
Plot collage for all given mtypes.

Collage reports show the cells in the atlas.

Attributes:
    mtypes (list(str)): Mtypes to plot.
    nb_jobs (int): Number of joblib workers.
    joblib_verbose (int): Verbosity level of joblib.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotSingleCollage
documentation:
Plot collage for a single mtype.

Attributes:
    nb_jobs (int): Number of joblib workers.
    joblib_verbose (int): Verbosity level of joblib.
    collage_base_path (str): Path to the output folder.
    sample (float): Number of cells to use, if None, all available.
    dpi (int): Dpi for pdf rendering (rasterized).
    realistic_diameters (bool): Set or unset realistic diameter when NeuroM plot neurons.
    linewidth (float): Linewidth used by NeuroM to plot neurons.
    diameter_scale (float): Diameter scale used by NeuroM to plot neurons.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotScales
documentation:
Plot scales.

Create images of scaling factors used when the cells are generated.

The generated images are like the following:

```{image} scale_statistics-5.png
:width: 600
```

Attributes:

: mtypes (list(str)): Mtypes to plot.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotPathDistanceFits
documentation:
Plot fits of path distances as functions of their projection.

The generated images are like the following:

```{image} path_distance_fit-1.png
```

Attributes:

: mtypes (list(str)): Mtypes to plot.
  morphology_path (str): Column name to use in the DF from ApplySubstitutionRules.
  nb_jobs (int): Number of jobs.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.MorphologyValidationReports
documentation:
Create morphology validation reports.

Attributes:
    mtypes (list(str)): List of mtypes to plot.
    morphology_path (str): Column name to use in the DF from ApplySubstitutionRules.
    nb_jobs (int): Number of jobs.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.validation.PlotScoreMatrix
documentation:
Create score matrix reports.

The generated images are like the following:

```{image} score_matrix_reports-1.png
:width: 400
```

Attributes:

: mtypes (list(str)): List of mtypes to plot.
  morphology_path (str): Column name to use in the DF from ApplySubstitutionRules.
  nb_jobs (int): Number of jobs.

Plot morphologies to obtain annotations.

documentation: Format the description of a parameter.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.cli.export_dependency_graph
documentation: Export the dependency graph of the given task.

classes.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.cli.ArgParser

methods.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.cli.ArgParser._get_workflow_parsers
documentation:
Return the workflow argument parser.

If parser is None, a new parser is created with the workflows as subparsers,
otherwise if it is supplied, the parsers are added as subparsers.

For each task listed in WORKFLOW_TASKS, a subparser is created as if it was
created by luigi.

methods.name: synthesis_workflow.tasks.cli.ArgParser.parse_args
documentation: Parse the arguments, and return a argparse.Namespace object.
Class to build parser and parse arguments.

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.validation
documentation: Functions for validation of synthesis to be used by luigi tasks.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.convert_circuit_to_morphs_df
documentation:
Convert the list of morphologies from circuit to morphology dataframe.

Args:
    circuit_path (str): path to circuit file
    synth_output_path (str): path to morphology files
    ext( str): extension of morphology files

Returns:
    DataFrame: morphology dataframe

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.get_features_df
documentation:
Create a feature dataframe from a dictionary of morphology_folders per mtypes.

Args:

: morphologies_mtypes (dict): dict of morphology_folders files per mtype
  features_config (dict): configuration dict for features extraction

  > (see `neurom.apps.morph_stats.extract_dataframe`)

  n_workers (int) : number of workers for feature extractions

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.get_feature_configs
documentation:
Getter function of default features configs.

Currently available config_types:
    - default
    - repair
    - synthesis

Args:
    config_types (list/str): list of types of config files

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._expand_lists
documentation: Convert list element of dataframe to duplicated rows with float values.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._normalize
documentation: Normalize data with mean and std.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.plot_violin_features
documentation:
Create violin plots from features dataframe.

Args:
    features (pandas.DataFrame): features dataframe to plot
    neurite_types (list): list of neurite types to plot (one plot per neurite_type)
    output_dir (Path): path to folder for saving plots
    bw (float): resolution of violins
    normalize (bool): normalize feature values with mean/std

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.plot_morphometrics
documentation:
Plot morphometrics.

Args:
    base_morphs_df (DataFrame): base morphologies
    comp_morphs_df (DataFrame): compared morphologies
    output_path (str): path to save figures
    base_key (str): column name in the DF
    comp_key (str): column name in the DF
    base_label (str): label for the base morphologies
    comp_label (str): label for the compared morphologies
    normalize (bool): normalize data if set to True
    config_features (dict): mapping of features to plot
    n_workers (int): the number of workers used to compute morphology features

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.iter_positions
documentation:
Iterator for positions in space of points every \<sample_distance> um.

Assumption about segment linearity is that curvature between the start and end of segments
is negligible.

Args:

: morph (neurom.FstNeuron): morphology
  sample_distance (int): points sampling distance (in um)
  neurite_filter: filter neurites, see `neurite_filter` of `neurom.iter_sections()`

Yields:

: sampled points for the neurites (each point is a (3,) numpy array).

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.sample_morph_voxel_values
documentation:
Sample the values of the neurites in the given voxeldata.

The value is out_of_bounds_value if the neurite is outside the voxeldata.

Arguments:
    morphology (neurom.FstNeuron): cell morphology
    sample_distance (int in um): sampling distance for neurite points
    voxel_data (voxcell.VoxelData): volumetric data to extract values from
    out_of_bounds_value: value to assign to neurites outside of voxeldata
    neurite_types (list): list of neurite types, or None (will use basal and axon)

Returns:
    dict mapping each neurite type of the morphology to the sampled values
    {(neurom.NeuriteType): np.array(...)}

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._get_depths_df
documentation: Create dataframe with depths data for violin plots.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._get_vacuum_depths_df
documentation: Create dataframe with depths data for violin plots.

documentation: Plot the layers at position x.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._plot_density_profile
documentation: Plot density profile of an mtype.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.relative_depth_volume
documentation:
Return volumetric data of relative cortical depth at voxel centers.

The relative cortical depth is equal to <distance from pia> / <total_cortex_thickness>.
Outside of the region `in_region` relative depth will be estimated, i.e. extrapolated from the
internal relative depth.
The `in_region` is the region within which to use the relative depth-values outside this
region are estimated.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.plot_density_profiles
documentation:
Plot density profiles for all mtypes.

WIP function, waiting on complete atlas to update.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._generate_synthetic_random_population
documentation: Generate a synthetic population with random projections.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation._get_fit_population
documentation: Get projections and path lengths of a given and a synthetic population.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.get_debug_data
documentation: Parse log file and return a DataFrame with data.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.plot_scale_statistics
documentation:
Plot collage of an mtype and a list of planes.

Args:
    mtypes (list): mtypes of cells to plot
    scale_data (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame with scale data
    cols (list): The column names that should be plotted from the data
    output_dir (str): result directory
    dpi (int): resolution of the output image

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.mvs_score
documentation:
Get the MED - MVS score.

The MED - MVS is equal to the absolute difference between the median of the
population and the median of the neuron divided by the maximum visible spread.

Args:
    data1 (list): the first data set.
    data2 (list): the second data set.
    percentile (int): percentile to compute.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.get_scores
documentation:
Return scores between two data sets.

Args:
    df1 (pandas.DataFrame): the first data set.
    df2 (pandas.DataFrame): the second data set.
    percentile (int): percentile to compute.

Returns:
    The list of feature scores.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.compute_scores
documentation:
Compute scores of a test population against a reference population.

Args:
    ref (tuple(str, list)): the reference data.
    test (tuple(str, list)): the test data.
    config (dict): the configuration used to compute the scores.

Returns:
    The scores and the feature list.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.plot_score_matrix
documentation: Plot score matrix for a test population against a reference population.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.validation.extract_angle_data
documentation: Extract all pairwise angles between neurite_types from the morphologies in df.

Task to get synthesis input files from a folder on git repository.

If no url is provided, this task will copy an existing folder to the target location

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.vacuum_synthesis
documentation: Functions for synthesis in vacuum to be used by luigi tasks.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.vacuum_synthesis._grow_morphology
documentation: Grow single morphology for parallel computations.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.vacuum_synthesis.grow_vacuum_morphologies
documentation:
Grow morphologies in vacuum.

With diametrizer='external', we will use diameter-synthesis,
otherwise 'M1-M5' from TNS are allowed.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.vacuum_synthesis.plot_vacuum_morphologies
documentation: Plot synthesized morphologies on top of each others.

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation
documentation: In-situ validation functions for synthesis in atlas.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation._extent_function
documentation: Inner function to compute the max extent of dendrites.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation.compute_extents
documentation:
Compute the extents (max radial distance) of all morphologies.

Args:
    sonata_path (str): path to a sonata file with morphologies
    morphology_path (str): base path to the morphologies
    ext (str): extension of the morphologies
    parallel_factory (str): name of parallel factory to use (see BluePyParallel)

Returns:
    pandas.DataFrame: dataframe from sonata with column 'extent' containing the computed values

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation.plot_extents
documentation:
Plot histograms of extents of morphologies.

Args:
    results_df (pandas.Dataframe): results from compute_extents
    pdf_name (str): name of pdf to save
    bins (int): number of bins for histograms

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation.get_layer_morpho_counts
documentation:
For each layer, compute the fraction of crossing morphologies.

Args:
    sonata_path (str): path to sonata file
    morphology_path (str): base path to morphologies
    atlas_path (str): path to atlas folder
    n_cells (int): number of morphologies to use to compute the fraction
    section_type (str): section type (attr of morphio.SectionType)
    region (str): is not None, must be the name of a region to filter morphologies
    hemisphere (str): left/right hemisphere
    ext (str): extension of morphology files
    region_structure_path (str): path to region_structure.yaml file

Returns:
    pandas.DataFrame: dafaframe with the counts, mtype and layers information

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation.plot_layer_morph_counts
documentation:
Plot count of crossing of morphologies with layers.

If 'label' column is present in counts_df, the barplots will split the data for comparison.

For example:
    df1 = get_layer_morpho_counts(...)
    df1['label'] = 'dataset1'
    df2 = get_layer_morpho_counts(...)
    df2['label'] = 'dataset2'
    plot_layer_morph_counts(pd.concat([df1, df2]))

Args:
    counts_df (pandas.DataFrame): results of get_layer_morpho_counts,
    pdf_name (str): name of pdf to save

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation.get_depth
documentation: Estimate the depth from 'pos' to pia using layer annotation from atlas.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.extra.insitu_validation.plot_layer_collage
documentation:
Plot morphologies next to each other with points colored by layer.

Args:
    sonata_path (str): path to sonata file
    morphology_path (str): base path to morphologies
    atlas_path (str): path to atlas folder
    n_cells (int): number of morphologies to use to compute the fraction
    section_types (list): list of section types (attr of morphio.SectionType),
        if None, basal_dendrite, apical_dendrite will be used
    region (str): is not None, must be the name of a region to filter morphologies
    hemisphere (str): left/right hemisphere
    pdf_name (str): name of pdf to save
    shift (float): x-shift between morphologies
    dpi (int): dpi to save rasterized pdf
    ext (str): extension of morphology files
    region_structure_path (str): path to region_structure.yaml file

modules.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit
documentation: Functions for slicing mvd3 circuit files to place specific cells only.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.create_boundary_mask
documentation: Create a mask on an atlas to to select voxels away from boundary with some voxel distance.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.get_regions_from_composition
documentation: Get list of region regex from cell_composition.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.build_circuit
documentation:
Builds a new circuit by calling `brainbuilder.app.cells._place`.

Based on YAML cell composition recipe, build a circuit as MVD3 file with:
: - cell positions
  - required cell properties: 'layer', 'mtype', 'etype'
  - additional cell properties prescribed by the recipe and / or atlas

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.slice_circuit
documentation:
Slices a circuit file using a slicing function.

Args:
    input_circuit (str): path to input file
    output_circuit (str): path to output file
    slicer (function): function to slice the cells dataframe

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit._get_principal_direction
documentation:
Return the principal direction of a point cloud.

It is the eigen vector of the covariance matrix with the highest eigen value.
Taken from neuror.unravel.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.get_centerline_bounds
documentation: Find centerline bounds using PCA of the voxell position of a given layer in the region.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.get_local_bbox
documentation: Compute bbox where annotation file is strictly positive.

functions.name: synthesis_workflow.circuit.get_layer_tags
documentation: Create a VoxelData with layer tags.
